title: Synthetic Societal Governance Brief
summary: Public-safe synthetic brief for a non-binding governance trace fixture.

title: Example Charter
summary: Synthetic governance DNA defining rights, consent, appeal and controlled evolution constraints.

title: Organization Shadow Level
summary: Non-binding organizational shadow-governance level used for synthetic simulation.

title: Example Member
summary: Synthetic participant represented without personal data.

title: Service Users
summary: Synthetic stakeholder group affected by the proposed service change.

title: Example Member Avatar
summary: Bounded AI avatar that can summarize options and submit non-binding participation signals inside explicit consent scope.

title: Example Member Avatar Contract
summary: Contract limiting the avatar to explanation, summary and non-binding signal submission.

title: Non-Binding Signal Scope
summary: Delegation scope allowing only non-binding participation signals and requiring human owner review for binding actions.

title: Example Member Consent
summary: Synthetic consent receipt granting the avatar the non-binding signal scope.

title: Example Member Private Journal
summary: Private synthetic journal represented only through summarized proof in the public trace.

title: Service Window Change
summary: Non-binding proposal to adjust a service window after rights, privacy and affectedness checks.

title: Service Impact Simulation
summary: Synthetic simulation of impact on service users and implementation effort.

title: Protected Rights Check
summary: Gate ensuring contribution or expertise weights cannot override protected rights.

title: Public Trace Privacy Check
summary: Gate ensuring private journal contents are summarized without exposure.

title: Service User Affectedness
summary: Gate checking whether affected stakeholder groups are represented in the trace.

title: Weight Change Check
summary: Gate preventing participation weights from becoming capture or social scoring.

title: Shadow Decision Check
summary: Gate confirming the decision trace is non-binding and human-owned.

title: Example Member Signal
summary: Non-binding synthetic participation signal submitted by the avatar within consent scope.

title: Service Window Shadow Decision
summary: Non-binding shadow decision created after governance gates and appeal path are present.

title: Service Window Decision Trace
summary: Layered public trace summarizing proposal, gates, evidence, participation, decision and learning proposal.

title: Service Window Trial Mandate
summary: Non-binding execution mandate for a reversible trial controlled by human owner review.

title: Service Window Trial Result
summary: Synthetic outcome evidence from the reversible service window trial.

title: Service Window Appeal Path
summary: Appeal path allowing affected participants to reopen or challenge the shadow decision.

title: Service Window Learning Proposal
summary: Proposal to improve governance DNA after reviewing outcome evidence; it does not apply automatically.
